heading: Definitions
label: 1131 Definitions
notes: Short TitleFor short title of this subchapter as the “National Transit Systems Security Act of 2007”, see , set out as a note under .section 1401 of Pub. L. 110–53section 1101 of this title

children.heading: Appropriate congressional committees
children.label: 1 Appropriate congressional committees
children.text: The term “appropriate congressional committees” means the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs, and the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs of the Senate and the Committee on Homeland Security and the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Department
children.label: 2 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Homeland Security.

children.heading: Disadvantaged businesses concerns
children.label: 3 Disadvantaged businesses concerns
children.text: The term “disadvantaged business concerns” means small businesses that are owned and controlled by socially and economically disadvantaged individuals as defined in section 124, title 13, Code of Federal Regulations.1So in original. Probably should be “part”.1

children.heading: Frontline employee
children.label: 4 Frontline employee
children.text: The term “frontline employee” means an employee of a public transportation agency who is a transit vehicle driver or operator, dispatcher, maintenance and maintenance support employee, station attendant, customer service employee, security employee, or transit police, or any other employee who has direct contact with riders on a regular basis, and any other employee of a public transportation agency that the Secretary determines should receive security training under .section 1137 of this title

children.heading: Public transportation agency
children.label: 5 Public transportation agency
children.text: The term “public transportation agency” means a publicly owned operator of public transportation eligible to receive Federal assistance under chapter 53 of title 49.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 6 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Homeland Security.
